properties.description: Alert for Container App revision errors

allOf.query:
ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL
| where Log_s contains "error" or Log_s contains "failed" or Reason_s == "RevisionFailed"

containers.name: [parameters('containerApps')[copyIndex()].name]
containers.probes: [if(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('containerApps')[copyIndex()], 'enableHttpProbes'), true()), createArray(createObject('type', 'Startup', 'httpGet', createObject('port', parameters('containerApps')[copyIndex()].targetPort, 'path', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('containerApps')[copyIndex()], 'healthProbePath'), '/')), 'initialDelaySeconds', 5, 'periodSeconds', 5), createObject('type', 'Liveness', 'httpGet', createObject('port', parameters('containerApps')[copyIndex()].targetPort, 'path', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('containerApps')[copyIndex()], 'healthProbePath'), '/')), 'initialDelaySeconds', 15, 'periodSeconds', 10), createObject('type', 'Readiness', 'httpGet', createObject('port', parameters('containerApps')[copyIndex()].targetPort, 'path', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('containerApps')[copyIndex()], 'healthProbePath'), '/')), 'initialDelaySeconds', 15, 'periodSeconds', 10)), createArray())]
